name: Mountain Side Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No public news or website found; the 22946 W Main St Armada address now hosts Guy's Barber Shop, suggesting the listed address may be outdated or the operator dormant. Armada Area Schools does not publicly name an outside bus contractor on its Support Services page.
fit_notes: Single-yard, sub-$1.3M MI operator at the bottom of the tuck-in size band; data is thin and address may be stale, so verify it is still an active operating school-bus contractor before pursuing.

name: B & S School Bus Svc
recent_news: Family-owned operation; Gerald Stepter and his son ran B&S Bus Service for 36 years per his 2018 Metropolis Planet obituary, with Kevin Stepter currently listed as owner serving Massac County / Joppa, IL districts.
fit_notes: Classic small family-owned Southern Illinois school-bus contractor with a multi-generational ownership history and a clear succession story; size is small (~$1.3M / 42 employees) but typical of platform tuck-in profile for Summit in IL.

name: Eagle International Bus LLC
recent_news: No website, no FMCSA passenger-carrier record, and no Pearland-area school district contract references found under this exact name. Pearland ISD runs transportation in-house. Could be a small charter/private school shuttle operator rather than a district contractor.
fit_notes: Very small (~25 employees, ~$1.3M) Houston-area name with limited public footprint; needs human-source confirmation that it is an active independent school-bus contractor (vs. a small charter/private-school shuttle) before treating as a real tuck-in target.

name: Fast Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER lists Fast Bus Service LLC (USDOT 4038572) as an active intrastate passenger carrier based at 3137 Clinton Ave Apt 3, Minneapolis MN with 8 power units and 8 drivers; MCS-150 last filed 03/04/2023 and operating authority shows NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire. No school-district contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (8 buses / 8 drivers) intrastate passenger LLC with an apartment registered address; almost certainly too small for a Summit tuck-in and may be more of a charter/shuttle than a yellow-bus district contractor.

name: Robertson's Transit Inc
recent_news: Long-tenured (founded 1970) family-owned NH school-bus operator under Neil Robertson, FMCSA-registered (USDOT 260681), revenue est. ~$1.86M and ~40 employees per third-party directories; yard at 72 Mad River Rd, Thornton with PO Box in Campton.
fit_notes: 55+ year family-owned central-NH school-bus contractor with classic succession profile (single-owner, near-retirement); small but textbook Summit tuck-in candidate in a state where Summit (Durham/Student Transportation legacy) already has regional density.
